title: Manifest Entry
description: A manifest entry for auto-discovering structured or unstructured data in object storage. Supports glob patterns, auto-partition detection, and explicit partition column definitions.

pathPattern.title: Path Pattern
pathPattern.description: Glob-style path pattern relative to bucket root. Use a single-star wildcard for one path level, and a double-star wildcard for recursive matching. Example patterns: data, one level wildcard, events, parquet files; or logs, recursive wildcard, json files.

unstructuredData.title: Unstructured Data
unstructuredData.description: When true, files matching the path pattern are cataloged as individual containers without schema extraction. Use for images, documents, and other non-tabular files.

structureFormat.title: Structure Format
structureFormat.description: Expected file format for schema inference. Leave blank to auto-detect from the file extension. Ignored when Unstructured Data is enabled.

separator.title: Separator
separator.description: For delimited files such as CSV, the separator character.

autoPartitionDetection.title: Auto Partition Detection
autoPartitionDetection.description: When enabled, automatically detects Hive-style partition columns from directory names (e.g., year=2024/month=01/).

excludePaths.title: Exclude Path Segments
excludePaths.description: Path segments to exclude from discovery. Any file path containing these segments will be skipped. Defaults to common internal paths like _delta_log, _temporary, _spark_metadata, .tmp, _SUCCESS.

excludePatterns.title: Exclude Patterns
excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns to exclude from discovery. Any file matching these patterns will be skipped. Example patterns exclude an archive subtree or a temp prefix subtree.

partitionColumns.title: Partition Columns
partitionColumns.description: Explicit partition column definitions. Overrides auto-detection when provided. Use when auto-detection cannot determine partition structure (e.g., non-standard directory naming).

dataTypeDisplay.title: Data Type Display
dataTypeDisplay.description: Display name for the data type (optional).
